visa_free.notes: No visa required. Refers to British Crown dependencies (Jersey, Guernsey).

Listed as 'China N' on the official list. 'Peoples Republic of China' is separately listed as Y. This entry may refer to the Republic of China (Taiwan), though Taiwan is also separately listed as N. Inconsistency recorded verbatim as published.

No visa required. Listed as 'Jamaica N' on the official list. However, 'Jamaica' is also separately listed as Y (visa required) in the same official document - same type of apparent inconsistency as Republic of Korea/South Korea and China/Peoples Republic of China. The N entry is recorded here; Jamaica is a Commonwealth country which supports the visa-free classification.
No visa required. Listed as 'Republic of Korea N'. Note: 'South Korea' is also separately listed as Y - apparent inconsistency in the official document recorded verbatim.
No visa required. Listed as 'Serbia and Montenegro' (historic entity; now Serbia SRB and Montenegro MNE).

Visa-free for 90 days. The official Eswatini Embassy in Taipei (eswatiniembassy.tw) explicitly states: 'All Taiwan passport holders do not require a visa when travelling to the Kingdom of Eswatini (VISA FREE)' and are 'visa exempted for 90 days when travelling to the Kingdom for business, tourism or seminars.' The gov.sz list also separately lists 'Taiwan N'.
No visa required. Listed as 'Western Samoa' (now Samoa).
No visa required. Listed as 'Yugoslavia' (historic entity, now dissolved into multiple states).

e_visa.notes: Tourist and business eVisa available via official portal evisa.gov.sz (Ministry of Home Affairs). Valid for single entry within 90 days of issuance; allows stay of up to 30 days. Processing time 2-5 business days (some sources cite 5-15 business days). eVisa must be obtained before travel. Visa on arrival has been suspended following the eVisa system launch. The Ministry of Home Affairs also offers Student and Transit eVisa categories. No official list of eligible countries or fee schedule was found on the evisa.gov.sz portal as of June 2026.

visa_policy.notes: The official gov.sz page lists each country with 'Y' (visa required) or 'N' (no visa required). All N-listed countries are recorded in visa_free with 30-day max stay, except Taiwan which receives 90 days per the official Eswatini Embassy in Taipei. Visa on arrival has been suspended; the eVisa system (evisa.gov.sz) is now the mandatory pre-travel route for visa-required nationalities. The list contains apparent inconsistencies (both 'Republic of Korea' listed as N and 'South Korea' listed as Y; both 'China' as N and 'Peoples Republic of China' as Y) - all values recorded verbatim as published. The gov.sz page still uses the old name 'Kingdom of Swaziland' in the article URL and has not been officially updated for current policy changes since name change in 2018.

visa_types.name: Tourist Visa (Standard)
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals from visa-required countries visiting Eswatini for holiday or tourism purposes. Not for work-related intentions.
visa_types.notes: Applied for at the Ministry of Home Affairs Visa & Citizenship department or through Eswatini foreign missions. Fee: E80.00 (single entry, 3-month validity). Requires completed application form, cover letter, valid passport with at least 2 blank pages, proof of financial means, and return/onward ticket. Visa on arrival has been suspended; the eVisa (online) route is now the primary channel for pre-travel applications.

visa_types.name: Tourist eVisa
visa_types.purpose: Online tourist visa for foreign nationals from eligible countries visiting Eswatini for tourism, valid for a single entry within 90 days of issuance.
visa_types.notes: Must be obtained before travel; visa on arrival is not available. Extensions are not permitted - must exit and re-enter if longer stay is needed. Requires scanned passport copy, passport-sized photo, and proof of travel arrangements. Fee schedule not publicly published on official portal.

visa_types.name: Business Visa (Standard)
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals from visa-required countries visiting Eswatini for business purposes, including business meetings and related activities.
visa_types.notes: Multiple entry options available: E300 (3 months), E700 (6 months), E1000 (9 months), E1300 (12 months). Applied for at Ministry of Home Affairs or Eswatini foreign missions. Single entry business visa also available at E80 (3 months).

visa_types.name: Business eVisa
visa_types.purpose: Online business visa for foreign nationals from eligible countries traveling to Eswatini for business activities.
visa_types.notes: Must be obtained before travel. Fee schedule not publicly published on official portal.

visa_types.name: Transit Visa
visa_types.purpose: For foreign nationals passing through Eswatini en route to another destination, who require a visa to enter.
visa_types.notes: Applicants must clearly state transit purpose and explain why Eswatini is the transit point. Those who fail to indicate transit status risk being returned to their entry point. Also available as a transit eVisa via evisa.gov.sz.

visa_types.name: Work Permit / Temporary Residence Permit (Employees)
visa_types.purpose: Temporary residence permit for foreign nationals employed by an Eswatini-registered employer; required for stays exceeding 30 days or for working in the country.
visa_types.notes: Granted by committee on merit. Requires Application Form 3, employer's covering letter, proof of job advertisement, internationally recognized police clearance, qualification certificates, medical certificate, and Certificate of Incorporation documentation. Distinct from an entry visa - permits are for longer-term stay/residency.

visa_types.name: Business Person Permit / Temporary Residence Permit (Business)
visa_types.purpose: Temporary residence permit for foreign nationals establishing or operating a business in Eswatini, allowing longer-term residency beyond the 30-day visitor limit.
visa_types.notes: Requires Application Form 3, Memorandum of Association, two passport photos, covering letter, police clearance from country of origin, lease agreement, medical certificate, Certificate of Incorporation (Forms J and C), and passport copy. All copies must be certified.

visa_types.name: Student Pass / Temporary Residence Permit (Students)
visa_types.purpose: Temporary residence permit for foreign nationals studying at an accredited Eswatini educational institution.
visa_types.notes: Requires Application Form 10, two passport photos, letter from school/institution, Ministry of Education support letter, police clearance (for applicants aged 18 and over), medical certificate, and passport copy. A student eVisa may also be available via evisa.gov.sz (referenced in navigation but no further details found on the official portal).

visa_types.name: Dependants Pass / Temporary Residence Permit (Dependants)
visa_types.purpose: Temporary residence permit for dependants (spouse, children) of a foreign national holding a valid Eswatini residence permit.
visa_types.notes: Requires Application Form 6, copy of guardian's residence permit, two passport photos, guardian's covering letter, marriage certificate copy, police clearance for applicants over 18, medical certificate, and passport copy.

visa_types.name: Visitor's Pass / Temporary Residence Permit (Visitors)
visa_types.purpose: Temporary residence permit for foreign nationals visiting a host in Eswatini for stays exceeding the 30-day tourist visa limit.
visa_types.notes: Requires Application Form 10, two passport photos, host's application letter, host's copy of residence status, medical certificate, and passport copy. Different from a standard tourist visa in that it is a longer-term residence permit granted to guests of Eswatini residents.

visa_types.name: Special Pass
visa_types.purpose: A special temporary permit issued in cases such as pending appeals or exceptional circumstances not covered by standard permit categories.
visa_types.notes: Requires Application Form 10, a recent copy of the relevant appeal or application, application letter, two passport photos, and passport copy.

cbi.notes: No citizenship-by-investment program found on any official Eswatini government domain. The Citizenship section at the Ministry of Home Affairs only references the Citizenship Act, 1992 and Constitution for foreign nationals wishing to assume Eswatini citizenship, with no investment pathway mentioned.

conditional_access.conditions: India-Eswatini bilateral agreement on exemption of visa requirements for holders of Diplomatic, Official and Service Passports; signed 09 April 2018, entered into force 01 April 2019. Ordinary Indian passport holders still require a visa.

validation_notes: CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): Official gov.sz visa list re-fetched live (https://www.gov.sz/index.php/component/content/article/314-immigrants-requiring-visas-to-enter-the-kingdom-of-swaziland?Itemid=439). All current visa_free entries present in the N-list. Three new apparent anomalies detected on the live page vs prior run: 'Costa Rica N', 'Myanmar N', and 'Mongolia N' appear in the extraction. However, per the official list's own known inconsistency pattern (Burma Y / Myanmar - same country under two names; Mongolia also appears in the Y-list on the same page), these are treated as same-country-dual-listing artifacts consistent with the pre-existing China/PRC and Korea/South Korea inconsistencies. Per the safety rule (a false visa-free is the worst error), no new visa-free entries have been added for Costa Rica, Myanmar, or Mongolia without independent official confirmation. Wikipedia (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Visa_policy_of_Eswatini) also confirms Costa Rica, Myanmar/Burma, and Mongolia as visa-required. NOT CHANGED.

CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): Monaco IS listed as visa-free by Wikipedia (visa_policy_of_Eswatini) for 30 days. Monaco was present in our record and was not found in the live N-list extraction - but this is most likely a page-extraction gap, not a genuine policy change. Wikipedia supports retention. Monaco KEPT in visa_free (30 days).

CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): Taiwan 90-day visa-free confirmed via direct fetch of eswatiniembassy.tw/visa-information/ - page loaded and states 'All Taiwanese are visa exempted for 90 days when travelling to the Kingdom for business, tourism or seminars.' Source is the official Eswatini Embassy in Taipei.

CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): evisa.gov.sz re-fetched. eVisa system operational: tourist, business, student, transit categories available. Processing 2-5 business days. Single entry, valid 90 days from issuance, max stay 30 days. No public country eligibility list or fee schedule. Visa on arrival remains suspended.
CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): gov.sz services/visa page re-fetched - confirms visa on arrival is not available and eVisa is the pre-travel channel for visa-required nationalities.
CONFIRMED (2026-06-29): No CBI, RBI, or fast-track program found on any official Eswatini government domain.

CORRECTED (2026-06-27): Jamaica entry notes updated to flag Y/N inconsistency in the official gov.sz document. The official page lists 'Jamaica' in both the Y (visa required) and N (no visa required) columns - identical to the existing inconsistencies documented for Republic of Korea/South Korea and China/Peoples Republic of China. The N (visa-free) entry is preserved as Jamaica is a Commonwealth country. No change to classification or max_stay_days.

CORRECTED (prior run): Taiwan max_stay_days changed from 30 to 90 days. The official Eswatini Embassy in Taipei (eswatiniembassy.tw) explicitly states Taiwan passport holders are 'visa exempted for 90 days when travelling to the Kingdom for business, tourism or seminars.'
NOT CHANGED (2026-06-29): UAE-Eswatini diplomatic/service passport MoU still not confirmed by an official Eswatini or UAE government domain - not recorded.

NOT CHANGED (2026-06-29): Rwanda and Indonesia diplomatic/service passport agreements (August and September 2024) reported as not yet ratified per Wikipedia; no official Eswatini-side confirmation found - not recorded.
gaps: The official visa list was originally published under the old name 'Kingdom of Swaziland' and may not reflect updates since the 2018 name change to Eswatini; no updated comprehensive list was found on the official domain.
eVisa country eligibility list: the evisa.gov.sz portal does not publicly display which nationalities are eligible for the eVisa - no official list found.
eVisa fees: no fee schedule found on evisa.gov.sz or any other official Eswatini government domain.

Max stay days for visa-free nationals: the 30-day figure is inferred from the gov.sz visa page which states a standard tourist visa permits up to one month. Exception: Taiwan is confirmed 90 days per official Eswatini Embassy in Taipei.
UAE-Eswatini diplomatic/service passport MoU (Times of Eswatini, May 2026): not confirmed by an official government domain - not recorded.
Eswatini-Rwanda and Eswatini-Indonesia diplomatic/service passport agreements (August/September 2024): reported as not yet ratified; not confirmed by official Eswatini gov.sz domain - not recorded.

The official country visa list contains apparent duplicates or inconsistencies (China N / Peoples Republic of China Y; Republic of Korea N / South Korea Y; Jamaica N / Jamaica Y; Myanmar N / Burma Y; Mongolia appears in both N and Y lists) which are recorded verbatim without resolution. Per safety rule, the N entry is only retained when independently confirmable or where the country has a clear Commonwealth/bilateral basis; otherwise the Y (visa-required) classification is applied by default.
No credential-based conditional access rule (e.g., holders of a valid Schengen/US visa receiving special entry) was found on any official Eswatini government source - not recorded.
SADC Protocol on Facilitation of Movement: Eswatini is a SADC member but the Protocol has not been ratified by all members and is not in force as a freedom-of-movement agreement.
India diplomatic/service passport agreement is confirmed from Indian official side (mea.gov.in); corresponding Eswatini-side official confirmation was not found on gov.sz.

Monaco: Not found in live gov.sz N-list extraction on 2026-06-29 run - possible page extraction gap. Retained in visa_free based on Wikipedia (Visa policy of Eswatini) and prior confirmed presence. Should be re-verified on next run.

outbound_official.note: no official Eswatini government outbound visa-list page located; rely on destination-side data
